name: GPT-5.1 Instant
tagline: First model under the Instant branding.
metaDescription: GPT-5.1 Instant (OpenAI), released 2025-11-12 — part of the GPT Instant line. First model under the Instant branding.
overview: GPT-5.1 Instant is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the GPT Instant line. Released 2025-11-12. OpenAI's fast, high-throughput default ChatGPT model line (API chat-latest) — low latency without extended reasoning.
What's notable in this version: First model under the Instant branding.
